home.districtsDesc: Each neighbourhood has its own character — happy to help you choose.
home.why1Desc: We live in Bodrum; we visit properties and meet owners in person where we can.
home.why2Desc: We share photos and descriptions as they are. You'll find a realistic picture on arrival.
home.why3Desc: Conditional refund window up to 7 days before arrival. If plans change, let's find a way.
home.why4Desc: We set the terms and rate individually for your property and share them upfront — no surprises.
home.reviewsDesc: Impressions guests have shared after their stay.
home.blogDesc: Up-to-date articles to help you plan your trip.
home.intro1: Bodrumapartkiralama is a small local platform offering apartment rental on the Bodrum peninsula. We work with property owners across different neighbourhoods — from the lively shore of Gümbet to Yalıkavak's boutique marina, from Turgutreis's family-friendly beaches to Bitez's quieter coves. We share property descriptions and photos as they are, and pass on pricing in advance.
home.intro2: An apartment can be a practical choice for families: your own kitchen, a separate room for the kids, flexible meal times and a more reasonable per-person cost. Share your dates for daily, weekly or monthly options and we'll review suitable apartments together.
home.intro3: Besides accommodation, we work with partners for the pieces around your trip: private airport transfer from Milas-Bodrum, daily boat tours or blue cruises, car rental, and selected Bodrum tours. We can share options on request and pass guests directly to the operator when they prefer to book themselves.
home.intro4: How it works: share your dates and group size; we send suitable apartment options. For the apartment you like, we help you reach the owner and clarify booking details. For the conditional cancellation window 7 days before arrival, see our refund page.
home.intro5: We're happy to share local knowledge. A beach with shallow water for kids, the days fishermen restaurants bring in fresh catch, a cove that stays quieter on weekends — ask, and we'll do our best to point you in the right direction.
home.intro6: When you share your dates for your Bodrum trip, we can review suitable apartments and seasonal conditions together.

faq.q1: Is an apartment usually cheaper than a hotel in Bodrum?
faq.a1: For groups of 4 or more — and especially families — an apartment is often the more budget-friendly choice. The more people share the apartment, the lower the per-person cost. Cooking some meals at home also tends to reduce overall dining spend.
faq.a2: After you submit the form, we reach out via WhatsApp or phone — within 24 hours. Once availability is confirmed, we share payment details, and once payment arrives, a confirmation email follows.
faq.a3: For cancellations 7 or more days before arrival, the amount you paid is refunded. Cancellations within 7 days may incur a partial fee depending on season and property; details are shared in the booking confirmation.
faq.a4: We work with owners in Gümbet, Turgutreis, Yalıkavak, Bitez, Ortakent, Gündoğan and Torba. Each district page shows the current options for that area.
faq.a5: Through our transfer partners we can arrange private transfer from Milas-Bodrum Airport to your apartment. Request it during booking or check the Transfer page for details.
faq.a6: Typically 3 nights minimum in high season (June–September) and 2 nights off-season. It varies by property; weekly stays often come with a discount.
faq.q7: How much does it cost to rent an apartment in Bodrum?
faq.a7: We don't keep a fixed price list — the rate depends on your dates, group size, area and the apartment's amenities. Tell us your travel dates and how many you are, and we'll quickly share the best options and a tailored offer from the owners we've worked with since 2013. Because we work directly with the owners, there's no extra middleman commission.
faq.a8: The right area depends on your style of holiday. Gümbet suits lively nightlife and beach access; Bitez and Ortakent are calmer and family-friendly; Yalıkavak is the upscale, marina choice; Gündoğan and Torba stand out for nature and quiet. Tell us what you're after and we'll suggest the bay that fits you best.
faq.a9: Some of our apartments are pet-friendly. We confirm this with the owner before booking. Let us know your pet's type and size and we'll filter the suitable options and send them over.
faq.q10: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.a10: Standard check-in is 2:00 PM and check-out is 11:00 AM. If there's no same-day guest, early check-in or late check-out can usually be arranged free of charge — just let us know in advance and we'll confirm availability close to your stay.

boat.metaTitle: Bodrum Boat Rental 2026 | Daily, Blue Cruise & Private Charter
boat.metaDesc: Daily boat tours, blue cruise and private charter in Bodrum. Departures from Yalıkavak, Türkbükü, Bodrum centre. Transparent pricing, captain included.
boat.subtitle: Daily tour, blue cruise, private charter — a boat and route for every budget.
boat.intro1: A boat trip in Bodrum lets you see the peninsula's coves from the sea side — a pleasant and different kind of day, especially for families. We can pass on daily boat tours, blue cruise packages, and private charter options through partner operators. We prefer working with operators who use local captains and keep insurance and inspections up to date.
boat.intro2: Daily tours depart from Bodrum centre, Yalıkavak and Turgutreis. They cover popular stops like Black Island, Orak Island, Aquarium Cove, Çıralı, Kargı and Meteor. Blue cruise packages stretch into the Gökova Gulf (Sedir Island, Cleopatra Beach, Akbük) or the Datça-Knidos line. For a romantic getaway there is a two-person gulet; for larger groups, a 15-20 guest motor yacht.
boat.intro3: Private charters are ideal for birthdays, proposals, corporate events and sunset cruises. Add-ons such as chef service, sound system, dive gear, or jet skis can be arranged on request. Share your budget and we'll find the right boat.
boat.boatType2Desc: 4-8 cabins, 3-7 nights, full board, fixed or custom route.
boat.boatType3Desc: Hourly or daily, captain + hostess, ideal for sunset cruises.
boat.boatType4Desc: Knidos ancient city, Palamutbükü, Hayıtbükü, Ovabükü.
boat.route1: Bodrum → Black Island → Aquarium Cove → Meteor

car.metaTitle: Bodrum Car Rental 2026 | Airport Delivery, Insurance Included
car.metaDesc: Affordable car rental in Bodrum. Pick up at Milas-Bodrum Airport or town centre. Full insurance, unlimited km, flexible return.
car.subtitle: Airport delivery, full insurance included, unlimited km — transparent pricing.
car.intro1: A rental car can be a practical way to move around Bodrum at your own pace. Public transport slows down in season and taxi costs add up over the week. We arrange cars through partner rent-a-car providers; full insurance, unlimited mileage and airport delivery are usually part of the package, and details are shared when confirming the booking.
car.intro2: Our fleet covers everything from economy to premium SUV. Compact cars (Fiat Egea, Renault Clio) suit city driving and couples; mid-size sedans (Toyota Corolla, VW Passat) work for families; SUVs (Dacia Duster, Hyundai Tucson) offer extra luggage space; premium cars (BMW 3 Series, Mercedes C) fit business trips or special events.
car.intro3: Pick-up locations: Milas-Bodrum Airport (24/7), Bodrum centre, Yalıkavak, Turgutreis, Bitez. Hotel delivery is free. Return at a different location is possible (e.g. pick up at the airport, return in Yalıkavak). Minimum rental is 1 day; weekly and monthly rentals get a 15-25% discount. Drivers must be 21+ with a valid licence; international or Turkish licences are accepted.
car.carClass1Desc: Fiat Egea, Renault Clio, Hyundai i20. 4 guests + 2 bags.
car.carClass2Desc: Toyota Corolla, Renault Megane. 5 guests + 3 bags, automatic.
car.carClass3Desc: Dacia Duster, Hyundai Tucson. 5 guests + 4 bags, high comfort.
car.carClass4Desc: BMW 3, Mercedes C, Volvo XC60. Luxury interior, premium feel.

transfer.metaTitle: Bodrum Airport Transfer | Milas-Bodrum Private Transfer 2026
transfer.metaDesc: Milas-Bodrum Airport private transfer. Sedan, Vito and Sprinter to Yalıkavak, Gümbet, Turgutreis and all districts. Fixed price.
transfer.subtitle: From Milas-Bodrum Airport to your apartment door in a private vehicle.
transfer.intro1: Milas-Bodrum Airport sits 35 km from Bodrum centre and 50 km from Yalıkavak. Rather than hunting for a taxi when you land, a pre-arranged transfer can be practical — especially for families with children and lots of luggage. We arrange private transfers through our local driver team or partner operators. Vehicles are air-conditioned and insured; water and Wi-Fi are included, and drivers track your flight.
transfer.intro2: Vehicle types match your group and luggage. 1-3 guests: sedan (Mercedes E, VW Passat). 4-7 guests: Vito or VW Caravelle. 8-16 guests: Mercedes Sprinter. A baby seat is provided free on request.
transfer.intro3: Prices are fixed by region; you'll get a clear quote at booking. No surcharges at night or in peak periods. One-way or round-trip available; round-trip gets a 10% discount.
transfer.vehicle1Desc: Mercedes E or VW Passat. 3 suitcases.
transfer.vehicle2Desc: Mercedes Vito or VW Caravelle. 6 suitcases.
transfer.vehicle3Desc: Mercedes Sprinter. Wide luggage area, leather seats.

tours.metaTitle: Bodrum Daily Tours 2026 | Blue Cruise, Diving, Jeep Safari
tours.metaDesc: Daily tours in Bodrum: blue cruise, diving, jeep safari, ancient city tours. Local and international tour partners, transparent prices.
tours.subtitle: Blue cruise, diving, jeep safari, ancient cities — the best ways to discover Bodrum.
tours.intro1: Bodrum is more than its beaches. The peninsula is rich in both nature and history — ancient cities, coves, dive sites, and inland villages worth exploring. When we work with partner operators, we prefer those who use local, certified guides; tours typically include lunch, insurance and transport.
tours.intro2: The classic blue cruise spends a day on the bays with 3-4 swimming stops and lunch on board. Diving tours suit all levels; no certification is needed for an intro dive. A jeep safari brings you to the peninsula's inland villages, old windmills and panoramic peaks. Ancient city tours cover Bodrum Castle, Mausoleum of Halicarnassus, Pedasa and Knidos.
tours.intro3: Minimum group size per tour is 4-6; individual bookings are grouped with other guests. For a private experience, the entire vehicle or boat can be chartered.
tours.tour2Desc: All levels, no certification needed, 60-min dive.
tours.tour4Desc: Bodrum Castle, Mausoleum, Pedasa with guide.

about.metaDesc: A small local platform for apartment rental on the Bodrum peninsula. We bring property owners and guests directly together.
about.subtitle: A small-scale local platform for apartment rental in Bodrum.
about.section1: Bodrumapartkiralama is a property management platform offering apartment rental on the Bodrum peninsula. We bring owners and guests directly together with a transparent, no-middleman model. Where we can, we visit the properties we work with, meet the owners, and pass along guest questions as directly as possible.
about.section2: We try to publish high- and low-season pricing on the page openly. Instead of fully automated online booking we prefer a form + WhatsApp flow — context-specific information (around holidays, busy weeks, current availability) tends to be more accurate that way. We aim to stay reachable through your stay.
about.section3: For the pieces around accommodation (airport transfer, sunset cruise, diving, car rental), we can pass you to vetted partners. Happy to share notes on which beaches suit families with children, which coves stay quieter on weekends, and local market days.
